title: cistanthe subverticillata
intro: Cistanthe subverticillata, also known as Purple Cock's Comb, is a type of flowering plant in the Portulacaceae family. It is native to South America and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Cistanthe subverticillata is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, with dried flowers and leaves used in herbal preparations.
